title: Knotted Alder Island Remodel
subtitle: Complete Kitchen Transformation
description: A full kitchen transformation centered around a massive custom knotty alder island. We pulled the entire space down to the studs, reworking the layout to accommodate modern appliances and vastly improved storage.

title: Rift-Cut Oak Mudroom
subtitle: Functionally Beautiful
description: Beautiful doesn't mean fragile. We designed these rift-cut white oak mudroom cabinets to handle daily abuse while looking like a high-end furniture piece. Built-in storage hooks, a concealed broom closet, and deep cubbies ensure everything has its place.

title: Hidden Compartment Mantle
subtitle: Custom Millwork
description: The client asked us to replicate a beloved fireplace mantle—with a twist. We engineered a custom front panel that lifts smoothly on hinges to reveal a hidden storage compartment, completely invisible when closed. Finished with floating oak shelves.

title: Floor-to-Ceiling Luxury
subtitle: Modern Home Office
description: A modern home office demands more than basic shelving. We designed and built this custom floor-to-ceiling bookcase to emphasize the lofty height of the room, bringing an air of serious luxury and solid craftsmanship to the workspace.

title: The Ultimate Workbench
subtitle: Garage Storage Solutions
description: A custom garage deserves custom cabinetry. We outfitted this workspace with heavy-duty cabinets and a solid butcher block top, seamlessly integrated alongside an 8-foot tall double-door storage locker. Built to work.
